text: Once the first walk is completed for a specific area, the QA/QC department will issue a correction list to the Contractor. The Contractor will then issue the Correction Items for the specific area to the  responsible  Subcontractor(s).  The  Subcontractor  will  have  one  (1)  week  to  remedy  all correction  items.  If  Subcontractor  does  not  remedy  all  correction  items  within  one  (1)  week, Contractor  will  complete  all  items  on  Subcontractors  behalf,  and  all  costs  associated  with  the completion of the correction items will be back-charged to the Subcontractor.
